creator: glarkin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I'm not sure what the patch does exactly, but I committed a change 
to make USE_GCC only accept version 4.2, instead of 4.2+.  You are 
correct about that - it doesn't make sense to build a higher 
version of gcc, if gcc 4.2 is the only one that currently supports 
gcj. 

I am working on enabling gcj in gcc 4.5, and that will eventually 
become the standard version used to build pdftk. 

Thank you for the bug report!
